title: Pushpa Dental Speciality Centre
heading: Meet Our Expert Dentists
description: Pushpa Dental Clinic in Gomti Nagar, Lucknow provides comprehensive dental care including root canal treatment, dental implants, teeth whitening, wisdom tooth extraction, dentures, crowns & bridges, laser dentistry, and preventive dental care. Book your appointment today for expert and compassionate dental treatment.
text: Pushpa Dental Speciality Centre A-131, LGF, Sahara Plaza, Patrakarpuram, Gomtinagar, Lucknow +91-9808101234 Home About Us Treatments Bleeding Gums Root Canal Treatment Dental Cavities & Fillings Dental Bridge Dental Implant Dentures Laser Dentistry Teeth Whitening Wisdom Tooth Extraction Blogs Contact Book Appointment × close An Award-Winning Dentists Best Dental Clinic in Lucknow! 0 Years Experience 0 Patient Stories 0.0 Star Ratings Our Expert Dental Services RCT (Root Canal) Save infected teeth and relieve pain with advanced, comfortable root canal therapy. Bleeding Gums Protect your oral health with effective treatment for bleeding, swollen, and infected gums. Dental Fillings Restore decayed or damaged teeth with durable, natural-looking tooth-colored fillings. Laser Dentistry Experience minimally invasive dental care with advanced laser technology for greater comfort. Dental Implant Replace missing teeth with permanent, natural-looking dental implant solutions. Dental Bridge Restore your smile and chewing ability by replacing missing teeth with custom dental bridges. Dentures Regain confidence and oral function with comfortable, custom-made complete or partial dentures. Wisdom Tooth Extraction Safe and gentle removal of impacted or problematic wisdom teeth for lasting relief. About Pushpa Dental Speciality Centre Specialized Care for Your Smile Pushpa Dental Speciality Centre is one of the best dental clinic in Lucknow . Our dentist had received many Awards for Excellence in Dentistry. We specialize in Advanced Dental Treatment using world-class technology and international standards, delivering painless and highly effective solutions in a comfortable environment. We offer a variety of restorative, preventive, cosmetic and implant services. Read More Award-Winning Team in Lucknow Meet Our Expert Dentists Dr. Vikas Kumar BDS, MDS - Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery 19 Years Experience Oral And MaxilloFacial Surgeon , Implantologist , Dentist 100% (4k+ Patient Stories) ₹500 Consultation ● Available: Mon, Wed-Sat Book Appointment Dr. Preeti Singh BDS 16 Years Experience Cosmetic/Aesthetic Dentist 99% (144 Patient Stories) ₹500 Consultation ● Available: Mon, Wed-Sat Book Appointment Frequently Asked Questions Do I have to take appointment before visiting the clinic ? Yes, you need to take an appointment before visiting the clinic. What digital payment modes are accepted at clinic? Paytm, google pay, credit card, debit card is accepted at the clinic. Is there a pharmacy/diagnostic/imaging service at the clinic? There is imaging service at the clinic. Are dental implants painful? No. We use advanced techniques and proper anesthesia to ensure the procedure is almost painless. Don't Hesitate to Visit Us Taking the first step towards a healthier smile is simpler than you imagine.
